# RIID-4813: Figma AI Agent Daemon Boundary Projection

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/migrationdocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to daemon-lifecycle-cli](../daemon-lifecycle-cli.md)

This slice adds a daemon-local projection of Figma v1.22 AI Agent screen coverage. It records which screen facts are consumed by the daemon and which remain upstream contracts/control-plane/client/desktop ownership.

## Added Surfaces

- `docs/30-architecture/figma-ai-agent-daemon-boundary.md`
- `docs/30-architecture/figma-ai-agent-daemon-boundary.riido.json`
- Stale agent-settings evidence refreshed to current `node-id=432:37336`
- Onboarding wording uses fixture vocabulary for `리도`, `영실`, `홍도`, and `지원` rather than daemon-owned template entities.
- Focused public Go tests cover daemon-relevant Figma nodes, manifest fields, cross-doc links, stale node ids, and fixture terminology.
- architecture-docs runs the boundary test when the manifest, provider-runtime/context-map docs, CLI docs, or tests change.

This slice does not add daemon UI, Figma integration, SaaS endpoints, generated clients, provider install flow, provider CLI bundling, or new local daemon commands. Figma remains product evidence, and contracts/control-plane coverage remains upstream.
